text:
(a) The department may conduct an investigation, inquiry, or hearing concerning a matter covered by this chapter or a rule or order of the department.

(b) The hearing shall be open to the public.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 21. Admin. of Aeronautics
##### § 21.151 — Investigation, Inquiry, or Hearing

(a) The department may conduct an investigation, inquiry, or hearing concerning a matter covered by this chapter or a rule or order of the department.

(b) The hearing shall be open to the public.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department may conduct an investigation, inquiry, or hearing concerning a matter covered by this chapter or a rule or order of the department.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The hearing shall be open to the public.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
